channel.title: Go Humble! RSS BOOKS
channel.description: Awesome RSS Feeds about HumbleBundle books bundles!

item.title: Picos, HATs, and More by Raspberry Pi Press
item.description: Make your projects come to life
item.content:encoded: Turn your tech dreams into reality with this bundle of comprehensive and practical resources from Raspberry Pi! Get a crash course in making anything and everything with the 2026 edition of The Official Raspberry Pi Handbook, and go deeper with manuals on AI projects, the Sense HAT, MicroPython, GPIO Zero, and more! Whether you’re building computers, experimenting with designing programs, making a game, or just want to try out some simple exercises to get comfortable with a new hobby, this bundle will give you the power to take technology into your own hands. Grab these Raspberry Pi ebooks now for the price of your choice, and support the Raspberry Pi Foundation’s efforts to get kids into coding with your purchase!

item.title: Pathfinder Second Edition Bundle of Frogs! By Paizo Inc.
item.content:encoded:
If your tabletop game nights are croaking, you could use a frog-themed boost from this bundle of Pathfinder Second Edition TTRPG adventures and miniature printable sets from Paizo! This bundle includes the ribbiting–erm, riveting Dawn of the Frogs, a mystery set in the swampy mires of Bog Bottom, both in PDF form and as a physical boxed set (miniature printables included)! If frogs aren’t your speed, try out the Extinction Curse storyline, beginning with the circus-set murder mystery The Show Must Go On! Or take to the skies in a flying airship and search the wilderness for magical beasts in Howl of the Wild! There are whole worlds to explore in this giant Pathfinder bundle, so get a crew together, grab it while it’s hot at the price of your choosing, and support the Craft Emergency Relief Fund with your purchase!

Keys Expire. Please redeem before December 31st 2026.

item.title: The Blade Runner Collection by Titan Comics
item.description: Discover the next chapter of Blade Runner’s story
item.content:encoded: Are you on the side of humanity or technology? Lose yourself in the renowned Blade Runner comic series in this bundle from Titan Comics! Follow the continued stories of Rick Deckard and Roy Batty alongside new original characters in thrilling graphic novels and comics like Blade Runner Black Lotus: Las Vegas #1 and Blade Runner 2019: Vol. 1: Los Angeles, and see a new side of this iconic dystopian universe. Uncover what’s new with the Tyrell Corporation, and help support Direct Relief with your purchase!

item.title: Linux: All the Things by O'Reilly
item.content:encoded: Tired of that stale operating system? Add color, customization, and optimization to your workstation with the all-new Linux: All the Things Bundle by O'Reilly! Master the fundamentals of Linux with 15 eBooks that cover everything you need to know. Pay what you want for an expertly curated Linux library designed to streamline your learning journey with foundational eBooks like Learning Git, Linux Pocket Guide, and Practical Linux System Administration. Unlock what’s possible with Linux, and help support Code for America with your purchase!

item.title: The Tanith Lee Collection by DAW Books
item.content:encoded: Discover the unforgettable tales of one of science fiction and fantasy’s greatest authors in this bundle of Tanith Lee ebooks from DAW! Meet a Martian vampire desperate to evade the prying eyes of a private detective in Sabella. Follow people living on the dark side of a planet that might be about to contact another civilization in Day by Night. Explore the mysteries of a medieval-inspired world with a reluctant goddess in The Birthgrave. There are 26 books in total in this bundle from the master fantasist, so grab them all now at the price of your choice, and support BINC with your purchase!

item.title: Red Team & Blue Team: The Hacker's Complete Playbook by Packt
item.description: Get Defending APIs, Digital Forensics Cookbook and more!
item.content:encoded: Turn your curiosity about computer hacking into a fast-paced, proven, and ethical career with our latest collaboration with the tech experts at Packt. Pay what you want for industry-leading insights from eBooks like Cybersecurity Blue Team Strategies and Cybersecurity Attacks - Red Team Strategies, all designed to help you combat bad hackers and secure your slice of cyberspace. Learn the latest defensive and offensive cybersecurity techniques and deepen your understanding, whether you’re a novice or a seasoned professional. Take control of your future, and help support The Global FoodBanking Network!

item.title: The John Scalzi Collection: Old Man's War & More by TOR Books
item.content:encoded: If you’ve been sleeping on master storyteller and acclaimed humorist John Scalzi, or if you simply have the need to add more of his work to your library, boy do we have the perfect bundle for you! We’ve partnered with TOR to bring you the best that Scalzi has to offer, from epic extraterrestrial war sagas to parodies or your favorite sci-fi series. Join the fight with the geriatric warriors of Old Man’s War, given newer, younger bodies to fight an offworld conflict that soon proves more complex than it seems! Learn the ins and outs of supervillainy with the world’s newest bad guy in Starter Villain! Discover free will with the doomed ensigns aboard a starship in the Star Trek spoof Redshirts! There are so many more worlds, characters, and self-aware jabs at your favorite sci-fi franchises to discover in this bundle, so grab it now at the price of your choice and support World Central Kitchen with your purchase!

item.title: AI Foundations and Applications by Manning
item.description: The hottest AI summer reading list
item.content:encoded: Looking for a leg up on apps and AI? We’ve partnered with Manning Publications to curate the perfect summer reading series for curious, tech-focused minds! It all begins with the AI Foundations and Applications Bundle—embark on your learning journey with AI-Powered Search, Build a Large Language Model (From Scratch), or Deep Learning with Python, 3e and watch your confidence grow in these red-hot fields of tech. Make summer ’26 the season of growth for your career, and help support Feeding America with your purchase.

item.title: Craft Your Cosplay Dreams
item.content:encoded: With this bundle of how-to books on crafting the perfect cosplay, you have everything you need to turn yourself into the main character! Or the charming sidekick. Or the character nobody understands better than you. Try your hand at blacksmithing without all the fuss and craft the swords, shields, and armor of your wildest imagination. Collect patterns for masks, ears, pouches, and witch hats. Learn the ins and outs of 3D printing, cosplay as a business, and how to give your photos the aura they deserve. There’s a lot more included in the pages of this bundle, so get it now at the price of your choice, and choose your own charity to support with your purchase!

item.title: Supergirl: Woman of Tomorrow and More! by DC Comics
item.description: It’s a bird! It’s a plane! It’s Supergirl!
item.content:encoded:
If you’ve found yourself in serious need of comics after seeing DC’s superhero smash Supergirl, or if you want to give yourself a crash course before buying tickets, we’ve got a Supergirl comic bundle just for you! Collected here are the Girl of Steel’s most iconic adventures and essential arcs including all five volumes of Jeph Loeb’s beloved run, all six volumes of Supergirl’s New 52 rebrand, and all four books of Peter David’s delightfully surprising riff on the character. And it looks like a few issues starring a certain alien bounty hunter and a superpowered canine snuck in here too! Whether you’re a new fan or an old friend of the Girl of Tomorrow, grab these comic collections at the price of your choice, and support the real heroes at the Book Industry Charitable Foundation with your purchase!

The titles in this bundle are available through neonichiban.com. To access the content, create or log in to your neonichiban.com account.

item.title: Sonic 35th Anniversary Megabundle by IDW
item.content:encoded:
Celebrate 35 years of Sonic the Hedgehog with this megabundle of Sonic comics from IDW! What kinds of mischief have Sonic, his pals, and Dr. Eggman gotten into outside of the video games? Now you can find out! Catch the Blue Blur speeding through the pages of the official Sonic the Hedgehog comic series, collected together in 21 volumes of adventure and fun! Stay up to speed on all the Sonic mini-series like Imposter Syndrome, Tangle & Whisper, and Fang the Hunter! Enjoy all your favorite stories plus all the bonus content featured in Sonic’s 30th Anniversary Deluxe Edition! This bundle is perfect for diehard Sonic fans and newcomers alike, so snag it at the price of your choosing before it speeds away, and support Children’s Miracle Network with your purchase!

Keys expire. All titles should be redeemed before July 11, 2027.

item.title: And the Winner Is: Award Winning Fantasy, Science Fiction, & Horror from Tachyon
item.content:encoded: Here at Humble, we only want to give you the best of the best, and for our more discerning readers we’ve crafted a bundle of sci-fi, fantasy, and horror ebooks from Tachyon that aren’t just great reads, but award-winning modern classics! Dive into tales of technology and terror from genre-blending master Peter Watts in his short story collection Beyond the Rift! Wartime history and B-movie schlock combine in James Morrow’s World War II kaiju extravaganza Shambling Towards Hiroshima! An utterly unique voice takes on worlds beyond our own in Ellen Klages’ haunting short story collection Portable Childhoods! There is so much more to discover in this collection of fiction from some of today’s most daring authors, so grab these books while you can at the price of your choice, and support Doctors Without Borders with your purchase!

item.title: Tad Williams: Otherland, Osten Ard, and More by DAW Books
item.content:encoded: Experience the boundless imagination of best-selling science fiction and fantasy author Tad Williams with this vast collection of eBooks. Feel hums of energy radiating off the page with the techno-thriller City of Golden Shadow—your intro to the acclaimed Otherland series, where vast conspiracies harness wondrous VR worlds for wicked ends. Journey into Williams’ beloved fantasy world of Osten Ard with the The Witchwood Crown. Unlock 20+ amazing eBooks all for a price you choose, and help support the ACLU with your purchase!
